description: List the 5 most recently updated issues assigned to the current user with field projection on both arms — only the fields an agent actually needs to render a list view. Shows whether MCP closes the default-mode gap when the caller opts in.
prompt: List my 5 most recent issues (key, summary, status, type only).

skill.command: acli jira workitem search --jql 'assignee = currentUser() ORDER BY updated DESC' --limit 5 --fields 'key,summary,status,issuetype'
skill.note: --fields drops the default assignee/priority columns; key is implicit.

args.jql: assignee = currentUser() ORDER BY updated DESC

mcp.note: Per-issue self URLs and the statusCategory block are returned regardless of the fields list — that's the residual overhead worth measuring.
